subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 714618399/230825046 is not a GRB
body:
S. Bala (USRA) and S. Lesage (UAH) report on behalf of
the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 714618399/230825046 at
01:06:34.33 UT on 25 August 2023, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact 
not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to Swift J1727.8-1613, which occurs 
contemporaneously with a solar flare."
